general.name: CrowdStrike Falcon System Extension New Test
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F5C0A9B2-F9AB-4CC6-B94F-70EFD3A89818</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F5C0A9B2-F9AB-4CC6-B94F-70EFD3A89818</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CrowdStrike Falcon System Extension New Test</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>0D15DA79-CE69-4855-9D7D-980B31DF9CCF</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.system-extension-policy</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>0D15DA79-CE69-4855-9D7D-980B31DF9CCF</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Extensions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>AllowUserOverrides</key><true/><key>AllowedSystemExtensions</key><dict><key>X9E956P446</key><array><string>com.crowdstrike.falcon.Agent</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
